textByHashes.25a15afb0243b2423d122a30cd15eea6e2114082: Human? Human come to Grimgnash? Grimgnash pleased! Grimgnash hungry!
textByHashes.d5f35defffa587b2ce2418a7f2e04c3991f6783b: What human come for then? Grimgnash tired and hungry. Be quick, human. Answer Grimgnash before Grimgnash eats your legs!
textByHashes.3dd04587c3af23bc110a99d5d3880b3cb8d0c74f: Hah! Human hears right about Grimgnash! Grimgnash great and mighty griffin!
textByHashes.baca55276901b1353c7c9fb6dbb39026e293ecae: Now what human want? Grimgnash tired and can't sleep. Wolves make awful howling racket. Keep Grimgnash up all night.
textByHashes.ecca8b8c9b2dd6577a0bc8a5d03eb72e8709099b: Grimgnash's feather? Human come to steal feather? How dare human! Puny, scrawny little morsel! Grimgnash should eat human where human stands!
textByHashes.96382acbd5f5d54f2cacbd645ff5f0eea7eb8e5e: Quests? Quests? Human morsel wants a quest from Grimgnash? Human think Grimgnash is drunken dwarf or lazy ork? Grimgnash not gives quests!
textByHashes.d0070a722d226903fe9a6d118d0a5a7cf5331d44: Grimgnash tired and hungry and will eat little bite-size human!
textByHashes.391bd3b5b95e1997a4f8d9e2494422603a5fb168: Grargk! Grimgnash not care for stupid human things! Grimgnash hungry!
textByHashes.e5fdddbf267692a61c17e284942e90125ed06d35: Human toothpick dares to approach Grimgnash again after what human just say? Why human disturb Grimgnash? Human have death wish?
textByHashes.dea25095c4ec320b0e84e23e1a656f40707f29b4: Human help Grimgnash sleep? This good. Grimgnash let human help.
textByHashes.ba58bf3ff718edef7d7a7d9ab14a8ee4e37b8171: Hmm. When Grimgnash little grifflet, Grimgnash's mother-griff used to tell bedtime story to Grimgnash. That always help Grimgnash sleep.
textByHashes.8fe7047fe50da4dcb01dccca0a9376d23f4128b7: Good. Grimgnash like stories. Lots of death and fire and destruction! Grimgnash ready!
textByHashes.a19eba67469d68a0256cd0a41249242a2f73b7bf: And make story good. Otherwise, if no sleep, Grimgnash more hungry!
textByHashes.a1ba8872a8546a1be81af96fbcf15519aa37a678: Graveyard is good place for story. Is undeads all horrible and ugly?
textByHashes.15fa28c795f7239b8cccbbe9144cd9e75c9bb20b: Grimgnash like this story. Go on. Go on.
textByHashes.0334994f43085e511db8a4db5aebaa5dd0c899ec: Grimgnash? That Grimgnash's name! Not stupid skeleton's name! How skeleton have Grimgnash's name?
textByHashes.cd097eb6c1437e8383a9cc81f5642d621bcdb81b: Oh yes! Skullrot. That great name! Grimgnash like that name. Maybe Grimgnash call himself Grimgnash Skullrotter? What human think?
textByHashes.fa5093f0e20b08ccc3a2ab728a97a0268a2fdb8c: Yes. Grimgnash Skullrotter. Grimgnash like that very much. What happens next? This good story...for human.
textByHashes.4ce3ba7a17cc3faa69c380e1525d505e3d119dc3: Because he dead? That stupid. How someone happy if they dead? Stupid human tell stupid story! Raaargh!
textByHashes.f81b710ffccac8d1491f8b68a3443201e820795f: What human mean, dead? How Skullrot dead if he alive and walking around? That stupid!
textByHashes.3df75dcb55d676c018d5c0f7486565fa56e3d5a8: Now human call Grimgnash stupid? Human is stupid! Human is tasty morsel! Grimgnash likes tasty morsels!
textByHashes.0f216045e4b551c2d509a03a10105b05c3cb871f: A headache? That daft idea. Skeletons have nothing in head to ache. Grimgnash think human is making story up. Not real story like mother-griff used to tell.
textByHashes.220dcf5566833d3e719d4d7dde10b20b085af3ce: Yes, insane! Grimgnash like that word! Grimgnash mother always say Grimgnash's daddy insane. Grimgnash's daddy eat own claws. Grimgnash laughed.
textByHashes.e2997e43458ac4aae781f416d8c80724368d485a: Yes! Grimgnash liking this story now! Go on!
textByHashes.40e651d4fc3271a8cfef4ca012ad824926f9858f: Grimgnash not like gnomes. They stringy and chewy and they not have much meat for Grimgnash's belly.
textByHashes.5e2d8fb1f931cde6094743893f1d5af6e07f87a6: What?! Gnome snack gets away? That dumb. How Skullrot eat? Stupid human can't tell good story!
textByHashes.515d9be73f13970658446348919ce070a8c80c1d: What?! Gnome snack gets away? That stupid. That not good story! Grimgnash only feel more hungry now!
textByHashes.3618fa0ea6da04010bbe7c97873f6739d2b34252: Graah! That good stor...wait. What happen to gnome?
textByHashes.bc8bd52ec5728143c44b04073d8acb3e941112c9: What?! Little bite-size gnome runs away? That not good ending! Gnome should be mashed by something like...something like Grimgnash! Stupid human get eaten now!
textByHashes.64ea71054b88dae0c7399f7b04485fad9cfe23e9: [laugh][laugh][laugh]! Stupid gnome! Serves gnome right for being stringy and chewy! What happen next?
textByHashes.c1f6795c16f3776f2a01620778c1ef4b537d9b85: Grimgnash not care what gnome's name is. Grimgnash not give food names. Does human call a carrot Jasper or something? Tell rest of story!
textByHashes.2c8a01a5ecea0f2cd351a97de61e41dd00369e48: Stringy gnome gets away? Stupid human make Grimgnash more hungry with story like that!
textByHashes.7ab843180702215b4353a9589042eecd813a0460: Ah! Grimgnash likes gnome stew. Just like Grimgnash used to eat at home. Mmmm!
textByHashes.5fb30f26c02cec73f88fa5a5860ab71f6cc45d87: Gnome gets away? What kind of story that? Grimgnash think he eat human now!
textByHashes.d8d6dd7689ce6331f4b5afe4f0439cefec6bc519: Ohhh! This getting good! Grimgnash like this. [sigh] Grimgnash feels sleepy.
textByHashes.6f2554f0eaa9f1ec54a5f7629f2458b240dbfc24: Grargh! What? What? What little gnome see? He must not escape! Grimgnash hungry to think of it!
textByHashes.53e465581e31c4f5477497e79bf7a0ae8dc5f9da: Gnome gets away? What kind of story that? Stupid human make Grimgnash more hungry!
textByHashes.8a85fa4b96e966a23b4c01f8bfb2c926cfd2beb2: Boney? That stupid name for skeleton. Of course he boney. Human think Grimgnash stupid? Human make fun of Grimgnash? Grimgnash think human look better in Grimgnash's belly!
textByHashes.04e0a8cbb1e3d423fddcc51d12476192abefe6e5: What kind of name Harry for skeleton? That stupid name. How many skeletons called Harry you meet?
textByHashes.5741e5ee668866359874a2b48b0ace927219052f: Grimgnash think Grimgnash just eat you instead of story!
textByHashes.5a53e3bf00a78f60034579829356e476b0be6506: Gaah! This sound like boring story! Maybe Grimgnash eat you instead, yes?
textByHashes.313c1f850e90d61251c3f144ab9a37ee9fc3e0d4: Urgh! Grimgnash hate princesses. They bones and no meat. Need eating more, Grimgnash thinks. Speak of eating, Grimgnash maybe eat you instead of story!
textByHashes.e06d622a33fb708bfae6958cab5368327372ef27: Bunnies? Bunnies!? Grimgnash hate this story! This story smell worse than Grimgnash's feet. Stupid human tell awful story! Make Grimgnash more hungry than ever!
textByHashes.84a37d30a6e9b7129edd9cce61608b4937d8daa0: What you want, little human? Grimgnash hungry. Want tasty morsel like you!
textByHashes.a17795ae63aec96559334fd300fdf98a981a2dfd: I Grimgnash and I hungry! Perhaps I eat you!
textByHashes.f77ab9e934d9b7ab92ddc73308a41d7dba7aa9d4: Human lucky Grimgnash too tired to hunt for food. Stupid wolves keep Grimgnash awake with howling. Grimgnash can't sleep.
textByHashes.5e648ef534f857cfc8322ce7e2af2401e95243ac: Grahh! What human doing? Why human here? Grimgnash hungry!
